overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Legend of Zelda showing the character Link walking along a tropical beach shoreline. The character moves through shallow turquoise water and onto sandy beach while passing palm trees and large rock formations under bright sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical beach shoreline with shallow turquoise water

agents.ego_description: walking through shallow turquoise water toward the sandy beach ahead

entered.detail: cluster of palm trees lining the beach shore
tall rocky cliff formations visible in the distance along the coastline
large isolated rock formation standing in the ocean water
sandy beach area between the water and the palm trees

segments.scene_description: The character walks through shallow turquoise water along a tropical beach. Palm trees line the left shore with distant cliffs visible in the background, while a large rock outcrop stands in the ocean ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy beach with large rock overhang

events.description: character transitions from shallow water onto sandy beach surface

agents.ego_description: walking along the sandy beach passing under a large rock overhang on the left

entered.detail: massive rock overhang extending from the cliff onto the beach

segments.scene_description: Moving onto dry sand, the character walks beneath a massive rock overhang that extends from the coastal cliffs. The ground transitions from water to sand as the camera follows the character along the beach.

scene_state.functional_zone: open ocean shoreline with distant cliffs

events.description: character moves from sand back into shallow water along the coastline

agents.ego_description: walking through shallow water along the coastline with distant cliffs ahead

segments.scene_description: The character returns to the shallow water and continues along the shoreline. The large rock formation and palm trees fall behind as the view opens up toward the distant cliffs and ocean rock outcrop ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a tropical shoreline that shifts from shallow waters to a shaded cliffside before returning to the open beach. It begins with the character wading through turquoise water past a line of palm trees, with distant cliffs and a large ocean rock outcrop framing the horizon. As the character moves forward, the terrain transitions from water to dry sand, leading the camera beneath the heavy shadow of a massive rock overhang extending from the coastal cliffs. The scene then opens back up as the character returns to the shallow surf, leaving the rock formation and palm trees behind. Finally, the view expands across the shoreline, heading once more toward the distant cliffs and the solitary rock outcrop in the ocean.
